---
title: "Linear & Generalized Linear Models"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← All courses](../teaching.qmd){.back-link}

::: {.page-intro}
A second-year **M2 ENSAI** course, taught in collaboration with Frédéric Lavancier. It covers
the linear model — definition, inference, validation, selection and ANOVA/ANCOVA — and then
generalizes to logistic, categorical and counting models. Most resources are adapted from
[Frédéric Lavancier's teaching materials](https://lavancier-f.github.io/my-website/Ressources.html).
:::

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Slides

#### Linear Model

::: {.resource-grid}
[Introduction](slides/introduction.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Definition of the Linear Model](slides/linear_model.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Inference](slides/inference.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Validation](slides/validation.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Model Selection](slides/selection.qmd){.resource-chip}
[ANOVA / ANCOVA](slides/anova_ancova.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

#### Generalized Linear Model

::: {.resource-grid}
[Introduction to GLM](../glm/slides/Introduction_glm.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Logistic Model](../glm/slides/logistic_model.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Models for Categorical Data](../glm/slides/categorical_data.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Counting Models](../glm/slides/counting_models.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Exercises

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TD/TD1.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2-5](TD/TD2-5.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD6-8](TD/TD6-8.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

:::
